name: opencode-ctx
install_doc: cd ~/.local/share && git clone https://github.com/iamtheavoc1/opencode-ctx.git && cd opencode-ctx && bun install
notes: OpenCode plugin with 9 deterministic transforms across 2 hook points. chat.params hook: (1) tool-description compression (replaces opencode's 21 verbose tool definitions with dense schemas); (2) system-prompt compression (removes examples/verbose sections from provider prompt, signature-matched against ANTHROPIC_SIGNATURE); (3) oh-my-openagent prompt compression; (4) compaction-prompt swap; (5) optional caveman output style (lite/full/ultra via env var). experimental.chat.messages.transform hook: (6) lossless ANSI/progress-bar cleanup; (7) stale tool-output cap (>600B, older than 3 turns, head300+tail150 keep); (8) superseded-read collapse (earlier reads of same file replaced with pointer); (9) Anthropic 1h cache TTL upgrade (promotes cache breakpoint from 5m→1h on last safe assistant turn). Cache-safe: all transforms are pure deterministic functions; never rewrites/reorders messages; prefix cache stays stable across turns. Target: OpenCode only (Anthropic + OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini confirmed). Live benchmarks: Anthropic -38-41% (10-turn tool-heavy 334k→198k), OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini -45-50% (5-turn tool-heavy 112k→56k). 84+ live benchmark runs documented in bench/.
